items.name: ⏳ Young-Hee Head [Squid Game]
items.description:
This is the head of Young-Hee, a giant toy-like doll inspired by a traditional Korean schoolgirl character. She has a round face, smooth plastic skin, and big, wide eyes that seem to follow movement. Her black hair is neatly styled into pigtails with ribbon ties, and she wears a gentle expression. 

Our Store: https://www.roblox.com/catalog?Category=1&CreatorName=FNAF+Realms&CreatorType=Group&salesTypeFilter=1&IncludeNotForSale

✅Favourite for FREE✅
